meaning: n.绔嬫硶鏈哄叧,绔嬫硶鏈烘瀯
examples: A roar of approval resounded through the legislature.
His first important chance to show his mettle came when he opened the new session of the legislature.
The proposals before the legislature include the creation of two special courts to deal exclusively with violent crimes.
The other, and more important, race is the struggle for control of the national legislature.
Route 125 was one of four tests authorized by the state legislature in 1989.
